liner: This cinematic anthem transforms Cairo's struggles into a rhythmic celebration where music becomes defiance. Blending deep sub-bass with traditional oud and ney flute, the track builds from minor verses to an uplifting chorus of collective power. Smooth male and female duets weave through group chants in Egyptian Arabic, capturing modern nightlife energy without sentimentality. From rooftop views to sea breezes, every bar celebrates resilience and unity against fear. As darkness looms, rhythm grounds us; as doubt rises, a brighter sound emerges. This is more than pop—it is a proud declaration that love never breaks, lifting hearts when they feel like falling.
worldCaption: A glossy soundscape fusing 808s with oud and darbuka for an uplifting anthem of Cairo resilience.

bios.lead: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.
bios.back: Weaves harmony layers without losing focus.
bios.drums: Sets the pulse steady through chaos.
bios.perc: Adds traditional flair to modern beats.
bios.bass: Lowers the energy with deep, warm tones.
bios.synth: Paints atmospheric textures over minor keys.
bios.other: Scatters cultural dust for cinematic depth.
